phaseWorkBlocks.label: 1C

phaseWorkBlocks.expectedLiveEffect: Create one local recurring Codex automation that reads unauthenticated public GitHub metadata daily at 7:00 AM America/Chicago and may notify Ryan without mutating the workflow or financial system.
alertConditions: No schedule event exists within the preceding 36 hours
Latest scheduled run completed with a conclusion other than success
Latest scheduled run remains incomplete beyond the conservative delay window
stopConditions: The automation requires credentials, private data, or a paid external service
It cannot distinguish scheduled runs from manual dispatches
Healthy checks would create unavoidable noisy daily alerts
It would enable, dispatch, rerun, or edit the workflow
A read-only test cannot verify current workflow state and scheduled-run freshness
verification: Inspect the automation definition before activation
Run one read-only test against current public workflow metadata
Confirm active state and identify the latest scheduled run without opening logs
Verify no workflow, application, or production state changed
Refresh and health-check Runway OS
phaseWorkBlocks.reportBack: Reported automation identity, cadence, alert thresholds, read-only test result, limitations, and the separate Task 6 boundary.
phaseWorkBlocks.result: Created active automation expense-tracker-daily-plaid-sync-monitor; its unauthenticated public-metadata test identified active workflow 256886458 and successful scheduled run 29640666471 with no alert conditions, while excluding manual dispatch 29627530457.

Transaction identity omitted account or source identity and collapsed one legitimate synthetic collision row, recorded as a high financial-data completeness defect. Passing edit, split, isolation, and reporting behavior lacked tracked regression coverage, recorded as a medium risk. Plaid source impact remains unverified for Task 5, and no excluded action occurred.

Dashboard, effective transactions, standard reports and exports, subscriptions, cash flow, intended Personal and BFM visibility, LL isolation, and cleanup passed. The final ephemeral probe ran 58 checks with 48 passes, zero runtime errors, and ten controlled failures representing four defects: APR-blind locked payoff schedules, missing LL direct-route denial, same-day snapshot-note loss, and ignored negative appreciation. Goal CRUD, budgets, effective splits, averages, per-payroll math, actions, direct payoff engines, positive projections, linked balances, summaries, and Personal/BFM visibility passed. One medium tracked-coverage gap remains; no repair, protected-data access, live action, or durability occurred.

Temporary-data cleanup, git diff --check, dashboard refresh, health check, dashboard inspection, and final worktree review
phaseWorkBlocks.reportBack: Return a sanitized weekly/waterfall pass, defect, gap, and unverified matrix; ranked findings with acceptance checks; exact synthetic checks; preserved boundaries; tracked-coverage assessment; and Task 4D readiness.

phaseWorkBlocks.result: The tracked smoke suite passed. The corrected 58-check primary probe and focused ten-check confirmation probe recorded six functional defects and one tracked-coverage gap without unexpected runtime errors. Current-period effective spending, valid planning math, bill-source assembly, paydown pace, BFM payroll date, actual and target waterfall reconciliation, historical series, empty states, intended Personal/BFM sharing, LL denial, read-only preservation, and cleanup passed. Selected-date anchoring, scheduled card-payment amounts, signed payoff averaging, invalid paydown dates, sub-month payoff rounding, and tax validation failed without repair, protected-data access, live action, or durability.

Commit, push, PR, merge, deployment, and pre-existing untracked scripts/sync_prod_to_local.sh

Generated Phoenix-style XLSX parser and route probes covering sections, dates, job codes, matched and unmatched employees, malformed input, preview, save, duplicate import, and temporary payloads

Across a 40-check primary probe and focused seven-check confirmation probe, 36 of 47 assertions passed and eleven controlled failures represented six defect clusters plus one tracked-coverage gap. Parser sections, dates, amounts, roles, deduplication and headerless handling; BFM roster CRUD, pay history and delete cascades; explicit import persistence and re-import stability; role-spending totals; successful-save cleanup; storage isolation; and final cleanup passed. BFM-only route enforcement, matched-employee preview assignment, compensation-unit comparison, employee input validation, cancel cleanup, malformed-file handling, and tracked coverage failed without repair, protected-data access, external action, or durability.

phaseWorkBlocks.reportBack: Returned the sanitized Tasks 5A-5B behavior matrix, eight ranked defect clusters with acceptance checks, exact mocked verification, protected boundaries, complete cleanup, tracked-coverage gap, and Task 5C readiness.

phaseWorkBlocks.result: The tracked smoke suite passed. A deterministic 56-check mocked probe produced 44 passes, twelve controlled failures, and zero unexpected failures; a confirmation pass reproduced the failures and cleanup. Encryption, configuration rejection, pagination, entity-local account lifecycle, normal balance refresh, manual-row preservation, all-entity transaction sync success behavior, exact re-delivery, and isolation passed. Eight defects were recorded across manual cleanup, balance reconciliation, freshness, liabilities, transaction identity, persistence/cursor safety, modified-event reporting, and corrupt-token isolation, plus one tracked-coverage gap.

phaseTasks.title: Task 1: Inventory the existing repo and preserve pre-existing state
phaseTasks.summary: Record repo identity, planning surfaces, safe checks, live workflow state, and closed data boundaries.
phaseTasks.result: Read-only intake completed; tracked baseline was clean and two pre-existing untracked files were preserved.

phaseTasks.title: Task 2: Install the full Runway OS scaffold on a dedicated branch
phaseTasks.summary: Stage the standard scaffold separately and transplant only new Runway OS surfaces.
phaseTasks.result: Created codex/runway-os-full-install and added PROJECT_STRUCTURE.md plus the complete command-center tree without overwriting existing files.

phaseTasks.title: Task 3: Migrate current project-control truth
phaseTasks.summary: Replace generic scaffold placeholders with Expense Tracker's canonical current state, roadmap, decisions, rules, architecture, issues, and migration map.
phaseTasks.result: Created canonical project-control sources, the source migration map, parked issues, and proposed multiphase roadmap.

phaseTasks.title: Task 4: Adapt the verification contract to the existing repo shape
phaseTasks.summary: Require existing product roots for retrofit profiles instead of scratch-only app and scratch folders.
phaseTasks.result: Health checks now preserve and validate the existing web, core, and scripts product roots.

phaseTasks.title: Task 5: Verify and close the bootstrap
phaseTasks.summary: Refresh and inspect the dashboard, run Runway OS health checks, rerun the synthetic smoke suite, and verify the diff and worktree.
phaseTasks.result: Refresh, health check, synthetic smoke suite, JSON validation, visual inspection, and whitespace checks passed.

phaseTasks.title: Task 6: Review the proposed roadmap and authorize the first operational block
phaseTasks.summary: Confirm or change the proposed phases and approve the exact Phase 1 work block before any external or production mutation.
phaseTasks.result: Ryan accepted Phases 1-5, target-branch durability, and work block 1A with its documented live effects.

phaseTasks.title: Task 7: Commit and push the verified Runway OS baseline
phaseTasks.summary: Stage only the approved Runway OS paths, commit the install branch, and push it without force.
phaseTasks.result: Staged only approved Runway OS paths, committed e9a8e5e, and pushed the branch without force.

phaseTasks.title: Task 1: Re-enable the disabled Daily Plaid Sync workflow with Ryan authorization
phaseTasks.summary: Restore the intended schedule through an explicitly approved external GitHub mutation.
phaseTasks.result: Changed workflow ID 256886458 from disabled_inactivity to active.

phaseTasks.title: Task 2: Verify one controlled sync execution
phaseTasks.summary: Verify all-entity results and failure reporting without exposing financial row data.
phaseTasks.result: Controlled workflow-dispatch run 29627530457 completed successfully; the sync job and all job steps passed without opening response-body logs.

phaseTasks.title: Task 3: Establish production and demo health baselines
phaseTasks.summary: Capture safe HTTP, deploy, and workflow health checks in Runway OS.
phaseTasks.result: Daily Plaid Sync and Fly Deploy are active; production and demo roots returned HTTP 200.

phaseTasks.title: Task 4: Define recurring operational checks
phaseTasks.summary: Decide what remains manual and what later becomes a monitored automation.
phaseTasks.result: Compared five safeguards and recommended an independent alert-only Codex monitor; recorded top-of-hour cron hardening separately.

phaseTasks.title: Task 5: Add an independent read-only Daily Plaid Sync monitor
phaseTasks.summary: Create a project-local recurring Codex automation that alerts on disabled state, missing scheduled runs, or a non-successful latest scheduled run without workflow writes.
phaseTasks.result: Created and activated expense-tracker-daily-plaid-sync-monitor on a daily 7:00 AM local schedule; read-only scheduled-event validation passed with no alert conditions.

phaseTasks.title: Task 6: Move the daily trigger away from the start of the hour
phaseTasks.summary: Reduce GitHub's documented top-of-hour delay/drop exposure through a separate source-and-release block.
phaseTasks.result: Changed the default-branch schedule to 17 9 * * * through PR 83; Fly Deploy run 29645346441 passed, Daily Plaid Sync remained active, and production plus demo returned HTTP 200.

phaseTasks.title: Task 1: Rebuild the root README for the current architecture
phaseTasks.summary: Replace retired Streamlit and no-bank-linking guidance with the current Flask, Plaid, Fly.io, and three-entity system.
phaseTasks.result: README.md provides the current tracked-source-verified project entry point on main through PR 84 and passed production release verification.

phaseTasks.title: Task 2: Decide the future of PROJECT_KNOWLEDGE.md and plan.md
phaseTasks.summary: Approve archive, replacement, or historical labels after useful content is migrated.
phaseTasks.result: Replaced both files with concise historical notices, linked current canonical sources, preserved full contents through exact Git recovery commands, and parked the legacy plan's verification gap for Phase 3.

phaseTasks.title: Task 3: Reconcile CLAUDE.md and the untracked AGENTS.md
phaseTasks.summary: Create a concise tracked AGENTS.md as the canonical instruction source and reduce CLAUDE.md to a compatibility entry point.
phaseTasks.result: AGENTS.md is the tracked canonical source and CLAUDE.md is a compatibility entry point on main through PR 85; Fly Deploy run 29647452643 and production HTTP health passed.

phaseTasks.title: Task 4: Document deployment, data, and side-effect boundaries
phaseTasks.summary: Create current operator guidance without credentials or row-level financial detail.
phaseTasks.result: README.md now documents configuration names, deployment mechanics, data protection, and explicit authorization gates without secret values or financial detail.

phaseTasks.title: Task 1: Audit the transaction foundation and three-entity isolation with synthetic data
phaseTasks.summary: Inspect migrations, entity selection, transaction import and deduplication, CRUD/edit/split behavior, reporting-effective transaction semantics, and cross-entity denial using only tracked source, fixtures, and temporary databases.
phaseTasks.result: Work block 3A passed initialization, isolation, signed-cents, edit, split, and effective-reporting probes; found a high transaction-identity collision risk and a medium tracked-regression-coverage gap without implementation.

phaseTasks.title: Task 2: Audit statement and vendor-order import, matching, and categorization workflows
phaseTasks.summary: Cover CSV and PDF source profiles, upload, confirm and undo boundaries, Amazon and Henry Schein ingestion, vendor matching, aliases, suggestions, and category and subcategory handling with synthetic inputs.
phaseTasks.result: Work block 3B passed the tracked smoke suite and 60 ephemeral checks; it recorded three high-risk correctness defects, one medium regression-coverage gap, and one low operator-clarity issue without implementation.

phaseTasks.title: Task 3: Audit dashboard, reporting, exports, subscriptions, and cash-flow behavior
phaseTasks.summary: Check shared reporting rules, split replacement, exclusions, empty states, date filters, recurring detection, balances, and entity-specific output without opening production data.
phaseTasks.result: Work block 3C passed the tracked smoke suite and 297 of 306 ephemeral assertions; the remaining nine errors reproduced one medium Recurring Charges report SQL defect in all three entities. One medium tracked-regression-coverage gap was also recorded without implementation.

phaseTasks.title: Task 4A: Audit long-term planning projections and cross-entity visibility
phaseTasks.summary: Use synthetic assets, liabilities, settings, account links, projections, CRUD, Personal and BFM shared visibility, and the Luxe Legacy denial boundary only.
phaseTasks.result: Positive projections, linked balances, CRUD, summaries, and Personal/BFM visibility passed; negative depreciation and LL direct-route denial defects were recorded without repair.

phaseTasks.title: Task 4B: Audit short-term goals, snapshots, budgets, actions, and payoff planning
phaseTasks.summary: Reconcile the parked legacy goal, snapshot, budget, payoff, and entity-isolation expectations against current behavior, including plan locking and per-payroll budgets, without adding tracked tests or demo data.
phaseTasks.result: CRUD, entity-local choices, budgets, effective splits, averages, per-payroll math, actions, and direct payoff engines passed; APR-blind locked plans, snapshot-note loss, LL direct-route denial, and tracked-coverage gaps were recorded without repair.

phaseTasks.title: Task 4C: Audit weekly and waterfall derived workflows
phaseTasks.summary: After the planning foundation audit, reconcile weekly pace and bills plus BFM-to-Personal waterfall calculations, dates, empty states, and entity boundaries against validated synthetic planning, budget, transaction, balance, paydown-goal, and payroll-schedule inputs.
phaseTasks.result: Current-period effective spending, valid planning math, bill-source assembly, paydown pace, payroll date, actual/target waterfall reconciliation, empty states, intended sharing, LL denial, and read-only preservation passed; six functional defects and one tracked-coverage gap were recorded without repair.

phaseTasks.title: Task 4D: Audit payroll roster, Phoenix/CyberPayroll import, and role spending
phaseTasks.summary: Use generated synthetic XLSX and payroll records to check employee CRUD and pay history, parse-preview-save and duplicate behavior, role mapping and aggregation, temporary-payload cleanup, and intended entity and access boundaries without real payroll or HR data.
phaseTasks.result: Work block 3F passed parser, roster lifecycle, explicit import persistence, re-import, aggregation, delete-cascade, storage-isolation, and successful-save cleanup controls; it recorded three high defects, three medium defects, and one medium coverage gap without implementation.

phaseTasks.title: Task 5A: Audit Plaid connection, account, balance, and liability boundaries
phaseTasks.summary: Use mocked SDK responses and temporary entity databases to inspect configuration, link/exchange persistence, encrypted-token handling, account lifecycle, cached balance and liability behavior, and three-entity isolation without credentials or external calls.
phaseTasks.result: Encryption, invalid-configuration rejection, entity-local exchange, account toggle/rename/disconnect, normal balance refresh, and manual-row preservation passed. Overbroad link cleanup, unsafe disabled/partial reconciliation, entity-wide freshness, liability starvation, and tracked-coverage defects were recorded without repair.

phaseTasks.title: Task 5B: Audit incremental Plaid transaction-sync semantics
phaseTasks.summary: Use deterministic mocked sync payloads across temporary Personal, BFM, and Luxe Legacy databases to check added, modified, removed, paginated, duplicate, disabled-account, cursor, failure, sign, categorization, and isolation behavior without external calls.
phaseTasks.result: Pagination, all-entity add/modify/remove, sign, enabled-account filtering, successful cursor movement, review categorization, exact re-delivery, and isolation passed. Identity collision, swallowed persistence failure with cursor advance, false modified counts, corrupt-token fanout, and tracked-coverage defects were recorded without repair.

phaseTasks.title: Task 5C: Audit scheduled and public background-sync entry points
phaseTasks.summary: After Tasks 5A-5B, use mocked internals to check the protected all-entity sync route and the public dashboard background-sync path while leaving the broader public-route authentication audit to Task 6.
phaseTasks.nextAction: Confirm or revise work block 3H after a just-in-time Task 5C planning pass.
phaseTasks.blocker: Task 5C execution is not authorized until the mocked entry-point scope, public/protected boundary, stop conditions, and verification are confirmed.

phaseTasks.title: Task 5D: Audit the Luxe Legacy downstream-mirror boundary
phaseTasks.summary: After Task 5B, use mocked HTTP to check LL-only invocation, no-op configuration, eligible-row filtering, request and auth shape, idempotency contract, failure isolation, and absence of Personal or BFM writes.

phaseTasks.title: Task 6: Audit PWA, responsive navigation, public dashboard, and authentication boundaries
phaseTasks.summary: Use tracked source and synthetic or local behavior first without changing authentication, CSRF, credential, encryption, or public-route behavior.

phaseTasks.title: Task 7: Consolidate audit findings into severity-ranked issues
phaseTasks.summary: Record sanitized reproduction steps, observed versus expected behavior, impact, confidence, acceptance checks, and the affected entity or boundary.

phaseTasks.title: Task 8: Confirm the repair order and bounded Phase 4 implementation work blocks
phaseTasks.summary: Prioritize only evidence-backed findings after the relevant audit slices are complete.

phaseTasks.title: Task 1: Repair confirmed reliability and correctness defects
phaseTasks.summary: Implement prioritized fixes in bounded verified work blocks.

phaseTasks.title: Task 2: Expand regression coverage
phaseTasks.summary: Add synthetic tests around repaired workflows and entity isolation.

phaseTasks.title: Task 3: Add safe CI checks
phaseTasks.summary: Create private-repo CI that uses only synthetic data and no live credentials.

phaseTasks.title: Task 4: Deploy an explicitly approved release
phaseTasks.summary: Deploy only after local and CI verification plus a release approval gate.

phaseTasks.title: Task 1: Review desktop, mobile, and installed-PWA workflows
phaseTasks.summary: Evaluate usability and accessibility after core repairs.

phaseTasks.title: Task 2: Polish high-friction journeys
phaseTasks.summary: Improve confirmed friction without widening financial or authentication risk.

phaseTasks.title: Task 3: Finalize runbooks and release evidence
phaseTasks.summary: Make project re-entry, monitoring, and maintenance durable.

phaseTasks.title: Task 4: Complete target and parent durability closeout
phaseTasks.summary: Commit and push target history and record a compact sanitized parent pointer when authorized.

projectQuestions: What is the smallest coherent mocked-only Task 5C block for scheduled and public background-sync entry points?

issues.title: Recurring workflow inactivity remains possible but monitored
issues.summary: Active automation expense-tracker-daily-plaid-sync-monitor now detects disabled state, stale scheduled runs, unsuccessful runs, and runs incomplete beyond the delay window without automatic recovery.

issues.title: Daily Plaid Sync runs at the start of the hour
issues.summary: Resolved by PR 83: the cron now uses minute 17; the resulting Fly Deploy passed and the workflow remained active.

issues.title: Project documentation contradicts current architecture
issues.summary: Resolved and released through PR 85 as 216a992 by establishing tracked AGENTS.md as canonical and retiring competing legacy guidance in place; Fly Deploy and production HTTP health passed.

issues.title: Planning foundations lack tracked regression and demo goal evidence
issues.summary: Work block 3D passed 48 of 58 ephemeral checks, but the tracked smoke suite has no dedicated planning cases and demo seeding still omits goals and snapshots.

issues.title: Transaction identity can collapse distinct transactions
issues.summary: Work blocks 3A and 3G showed that imported rows or different Plaid IDs sharing date, amount, and description collapse to one transaction even when accounts differ; exact Plaid re-delivery remains idempotent and real-data occurrence is unknown.

issues.title: Transaction edit, split, and effective-reporting paths lack tracked regression coverage
issues.summary: The 3A ephemeral probe passed edit, split, cross-entity denial, and reporting replacement behavior, but the tracked smoke suite does not guard those paths.

issues.title: Vendor-payment matching references a missing transaction column
issues.summary: Fresh Personal, BFM, and Luxe Legacy databases all failed vendor-payment matching because core/vendor_matching.py references transactions.matched_order_id, which no migration creates.

issues.title: Vendor-order imports discard parsed line items
issues.summary: Synthetic Amazon and Henry Schein imports persisted order summaries but no order_line_items rows, leaving matched-order auto-split without the detail it requires.

issues.title: Vendor categorization can escape the category source of truth
issues.summary: Synthetic matching wrote an undefined category in all three entities, mixed-category ties varied across hash seeds, and the categorization endpoint accepted undefined category and subcategory values.

issues.title: Task 2 import and categorization paths lack tracked regression coverage
issues.summary: The 3B ephemeral probe passed 60 parser, upload, matching, alias, cleanup, and isolation checks, but the tracked smoke suite does not guard those paths.

issues.title: Upload Undo label does not explain its status-only effect
issues.summary: The action marks the monthly checklist incomplete but leaves imported transactions intact, while the interface labels it only Undo.

issues.title: Recurring Charges report executes an uninterpolated SQL helper
issues.summary: Fresh Personal, BFM, and Luxe Legacy databases all failed the direct, prepared, and rendered recurring-report paths because core/reporting.py sends a literal exclude_sql helper token to SQLite.

issues.title: Task 3 financial read-model paths lack tracked regression coverage
issues.summary: The 3C ephemeral probe produced 297 passing assertions across dashboard, reports, exports, subscriptions, cash flow, and isolation, but the tracked smoke suite does not guard the full read model or recurring-report failure.

issues.title: Locked payoff schedules ignore stored account APRs
issues.summary: The direct payoff engine honors supplied rates, but lock-plan hard-codes every linked card to 20 percent and sent avalanche's extra payment to the lower-APR synthetic card because it appeared first.

issues.title: Luxe Legacy planning denial is enforced only on page entry
issues.summary: Synthetic LL direct requests created hidden planning records, exposed a Personal account name, and changed the Personal planning settings singleton even though both planning index routes redirect LL.

issues.title: Automatic goal snapshots erase same-day review notes
issues.summary: A manual monthly-review note saved successfully, but the next page load replaced the current-day snapshot without its note and reopened the review prompt.

issues.title: Negative asset appreciation is treated as zero growth
issues.summary: Long-Term Planning labels negative rates as depreciation, but a synthetic asset at negative 10 percent remained flat at the future milestone.

issues.title: Weekly historical views mix selected and current dates
issues.summary: Historical pace used today's month length, historical recurring/card bills were omitted, and a cross-month burn window reversed the synthetic budget-health conclusion.

issues.title: Weekly credit-card bills use full balance instead of scheduled payment
issues.summary: A card titled 50 dollars due contributed its full 1,200 dollar balance to the row and weekly bill total.

issues.title: Waterfall payoff average excludes deficit months
issues.summary: The labeled three-month average used only positive months, producing 1,750 dollars instead of the signed 500 dollar average in the synthetic history.

issues.title: Invalid Weekly paydown dates persist and break the page
issues.summary: A direct POST saved a malformed date and the next Weekly read raised ValueError while parsing it.

issues.title: Waterfall can report zero months while debt remains
issues.summary: The payoff helper rounds a fractional month to zero when positive debt is less than half one month of positive surplus.

issues.title: Waterfall tax fallback can disagree with display and fail on non-finite input
issues.summary: A 100 percent input displayed 100 while calculations used the 22 percent fallback, and a direct nan value raised ValueError.

issues.title: Weekly and Waterfall paths lack tracked regression coverage
issues.summary: The 3E temporary probes verified current behavior and reproduced six defects, but the tracked smoke suite has no dedicated Weekly or Waterfall cases.

issues.title: Non-BFM entities can directly access and mutate payroll
issues.summary: Personal and Luxe Legacy direct payroll reads returned 200 and direct employee creates persisted entity-local rows even though Payroll is maintained and navigated as BFM-only.

issues.title: Payroll preview duplicates an exact existing employee
issues.summary: The rendered preview defaulted an exact same-name roster match to Create new employee, and submitting that default created a duplicate roster row for the imported paycheck.

issues.title: Payroll peer averages mix hourly and salary units
issues.summary: Active employees are averaged by role without pay type, so raw hourly and annual salary cents become a materially meaningless peer comparison.

issues.title: Payroll employee inputs are not safely normalized
issues.summary: Undefined roles persist while invalid pay type and non-finite rate requests raise instead of returning controlled validation responses.

issues.title: Canceling payroll preview retains the parsed payload
issues.summary: Successful save consumes its temp JSON, but Cancel leaves parsed employee, date, amount, and filename data until four-hour age cleanup.

issues.title: Malformed payroll XLSX raises instead of returning an import error
issues.summary: Non-XLSX bytes carrying an xlsx filename propagate a parser ValueError rather than rendering the controlled import-error state.

issues.title: Payroll lifecycle paths lack tracked regression coverage
issues.summary: The 3F probes verified core payroll behavior and reproduced six defects, but the tracked smoke suite has no parser, roster, import, aggregation, cleanup, or BFM-boundary cases.

issues.title: Plaid persistence errors can advance the cursor past missing data
issues.summary: A forced SQLite insert failure was swallowed as a zero insert, returned no sync error, and allowed the Plaid cursor to commit beyond the absent transaction.

issues.title: Plaid balance reconciliation is unsafe on disabled or partially failed items
issues.summary: A successful sibling refresh deleted the failed item's cached balance row, while an all-disabled item retained its stale balance because the keep-set was empty.

issues.title: Normal Cash Flow refresh skips Plaid liabilities
issues.summary: Balance refresh writes a fresh timestamp before the liability cache check, so the normal stale-load path never fetched or applied minimum payment and due-date data.

issues.title: Linking a Plaid institution can delete unrelated manual accounts
issues.summary: The first-word cleanup heuristic removed a distinct manual Chase balance when mocked Chase account data was linked.

issues.title: Plaid balance freshness uses an entity-wide maximum
issues.summary: One fresh Plaid balance suppressed refresh even while a sibling account row was two hours stale.

issues.title: Missing Plaid modified rows are reported as updated
issues.summary: A mocked modified event targeting no stored Plaid ID reported one update because the code increments without checking affected-row count.

issues.title: One corrupt Plaid token aborts valid sibling items
issues.summary: All tokens are decrypted before the per-item error boundary, so one corrupt ciphertext prevented a healthy sibling item from syncing.

issues.title: Primary Plaid paths lack tracked regression coverage
issues.summary: The 3G probes verified normal primary Plaid behavior and reproduced eight defects, but the tracked smoke suite only renders Connected Accounts and guards none of the account, balance, liability, sync, cursor, or failure paths.

nextMilestone.name: Bounded Task 5C entry-point audit decision
nextMilestone.description: Define and confirm the mocked-only scheduled and public background-sync entry-point audit before execution.
